// Windows probing logic relies on the word 'windows' in the OS
// there are only four 9x platforms that we look for
// Windows CE isn't really 9x, but crippled enough to
// be a muchness. Ant doesn't run on CE, anyway.
throw new IllegalArgumentException("Don\'t know how to detect OS family \"" + family + "\"");

is_family = OS.FAMILY_MAC in OS.__OS_NAME or OS.__DARWIN in OS.__OS_NAME
and (not OS.__isFamily(OS.FAMILY_MAC) or OS.__OS_NAME.endswith("x") or OS.__DARWIN in OS.__OS_NAME)
is_family = OS.FAMILY_ZOS in OS.__OS_NAME or "os/390" in OS.__OS_NAME
raise ValueError(f"Don't know how to detect OS family \"{family}\"")
ret_value = is_family and is_name and is_arch and is_version
